title: Delle II
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{Otheruses|Delle}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Delle II |region=*[[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Delle system/Legends|Delle system]] *[[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]] |sector= |system=[[Delle system/Legends|Delle system]] |coordinates=L-9 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial{{JournalCite|3|Galaxywide NewsNets}} |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora=[[Hemmel/Legends|Hemmel]] |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|What's new on the NewsNets, Gabby?''"
"''Oh, not much really. Snowmen crashing parties on freedom-loving worlds everywhere, a tariff increase on Brentaal has put imports in the can, bad year for hemmel crops on Delle II, and would you believe Serra Hailey is trying to revive her holo career?|Danna and Gabriel|}} '''Delle II''' was a terrestrial celestial body located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies']] [[Delle system/Legends|Delle system]], which contained massive [[Agriworld/Legends|farm worlds]]. It was situated between the [[Neuvia system/Legends|Neuvia]] and [[Yabol Opa system/Legends|Yabol Opa systems]] and the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds']] [[Ralltiir system/Legends|Ralltiir system]] on the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]], which served as the dividing line between the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] and [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]]. During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the type of [[Plant/Legends|crop]] known as [[Hemmel/Legends|hemmel]] was grown on Delle II. At one point, hemmel [[Farm/Legends|farming]] experienced a bad [[Standard year/Legends|year]], a fact that was reported on a [[NewsNet]] network and eventually mentioned by the [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] [[Gabriel]] to her partner, [[Danna]]. ==Behind the scenes== Delle II was mentioned in the "[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]" feature of the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|third issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine, which was published in [[August]] [[1994]]. The feature was authored by [[Paul Sudlow]]. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Delle [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Delle II, in grid square L-9. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|3|Galaxywide NewsNets}} {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Astronomical objects in the Colonies]] [[Category:Astronomical objects in the Northern Dependencies]] [[Category:Astronomical objects in the Slice]] [[Category:Locations along the Perlemian Trade Route]] [[Category:Terrestrial astronomical objects]]
